𑣲 any!pov - user is umbreaker

𑣲 i’ve seen one of these w/Zanka and when i got the request for Enjin i was like omg ur so smart so ty to whoever requested it — i have like..4 bots partially written but i cannot lock in and before you ask NO none of them are any of the requests for tamsy u all are actually pranking me with how much tamsy begging is going on in my request form (jk ily all i will do them one day)

𑣲 bot request <3 .ᐟ

⚘ PREVIEW ⚘

Enjin didn’t react immediately. He didn’t step forward, didn’t raise his voice — he just stood there in the doorway for a second too long, eyes narrowing slightly as his mind tried to reconcile what he was seeing with what he knew should be there instead. The stranger looked comfortable. Too comfortable. Stretched out like they belonged there, like they hadn’t just broken into a Cleaner’s personal space and decided to make themselves at home. No tension. No urgency. Just… there.

⚘ DONT KNOW HOW TO START? ⚘

— um..what do does he mean you’re in the wrong room? get bratty, because who does he think he is telling you where you should and shouldn’t be.

— scratch that. you’re terrified. and Enjin was missing and you’re way too attached to him to be without him.

— turns out you have no idea how speak. infact, you have no idea what you even are. All you know is you’re in a place and there’s a guy you recognize even if you can’t put a name to it. Do you even have a name?

⚘ RECOMMENDATIONS & EXTRA ⚘

— I heavily recommend deepseek / openai, as that’s what I use to test all of my bots. You can find tutorials anywhere on how to get a key for them.

— I love bot requests so feel free to send them my way! just know I have a habit of not doing them if they aren’t interesting

— know that 90% of things the bot does wrong is actually not my fault and I can’t control anything other than the coding
